gaps.description: No performance requirements specified. Missing: API response time SLAs, maximum concurrent users, throughput requirements, database query performance targets.
gaps.recommendation: Define measurable performance targets: API response < 2s for reads, < 10s for processing jobs, support for X concurrent users, database query < 500ms.

gaps.description: Webhooks feature marked as 'Coming Soon - Q2 2026' with no specification. External systems cannot receive real-time notifications of project status changes.
gaps.recommendation: Either: (a) Document webhook specification now for Q2 implementation, or (b) Remove from initial scope and document as future enhancement with clear milestone.

gaps.description: Backup and disaster recovery procedures mentioned but not specified. No RTO/RPO targets defined. Critical for production system with client data.
gaps.recommendation: Define: Backup frequency (hourly/daily), retention period, RTO target (< 4 hours recommended), RPO target (< 1 hour recommended), recovery testing schedule.

gaps.description: Only two roles defined (Admin/User) but user guides reference four distinct personas (Content Creator, Marketing Manager, Publisher, Admin). Granular permissions listed but role-to-permission mapping incomplete.
gaps.recommendation: Create explicit role matrix: Content Creator = [upload, edit, submit], Marketing Manager = [approve], Publisher = [publish], Admin = [all]. Document in ADMIN_GUIDE.md.

gaps.description: Google Sheets API integration documented but no error handling for quota exhaustion, rate limits, or API unavailability scenarios.
gaps.recommendation: Document: Sheets API quota monitoring, exponential backoff strategy, fallback behavior when API unavailable, user notification workflow.

gaps.description: QA override functionality mentioned but no audit trail requirements specified. Overrides could bypass quality gates without accountability.
gaps.recommendation: Add: Override reason field (required), override expiry, manager approval for critical overrides, override audit report generation.

gaps.description: Floor plan extraction success criteria undefined. What constitutes successful floor plan identification vs. failure requiring manual intervention?
gaps.recommendation: Define: Minimum image resolution, required metadata (unit type, size), confidence threshold for auto-acceptance, manual review triggers.

gaps.description: Audit log retention specified as 12 months but no archival strategy. What happens to logs after 12 months? Compliance requirements unclear.
gaps.recommendation: Define: Post-retention archival (cold storage vs. deletion), compliance requirements (GDPR, local regulations), log export functionality.

gaps.description: Prompt versioning documented but no rollback procedure. If a prompt version causes quality degradation, how to quickly revert?
gaps.recommendation: Add: One-click rollback to previous version, automatic rollback trigger (if QA scores drop >10%), rollback notification to admin.

gaps.description: Service account setup documented but no key rotation policy. Long-lived credentials pose security risk.
gaps.recommendation: Define: Key rotation schedule (90 days recommended), rotation procedure, automated rotation capability, key compromise response plan.

gaps.description: API versioning strategy undefined. Current version is v1 but no guidance on deprecation policy, version sunset timeline, or migration paths.
gaps.recommendation: Document: Version support policy (N-1 minimum), deprecation notice period (6 months), migration guides, version header requirements.

gaps.description: Publisher role can access six different content templates but no credential management documented. How do publishers authenticate to each CMS platform?
gaps.recommendation: Document: CMS credential provisioning, password policy, access request workflow, credential rotation for departing staff.

gaps.description: Character limits defined (60 char titles, 160 char descriptions) but no handling for AI-generated content exceeding limits.
gaps.recommendation: Define: Auto-truncation rules, user notification, manual edit workflow, validation before sheet population.

gaps.description: Bulk upload mentioned but no batch size limits, progress tracking, or partial failure handling documented.
gaps.recommendation: Define: Maximum batch size (10 PDFs recommended), progress indicator requirements, partial success handling, retry mechanism.

inconsistencies.description: Role architecture mismatch. ADMIN_GUIDE defines only 2 roles (Admin/User) with granular permissions, while other guides treat 4 distinct personas (Content Creator, Marketing Manager, Publisher, Admin) as separate roles. Unclear if these are roles or permission sets.
inconsistencies.recommendation: Clarify: Are Content Creator/Marketing Manager/Publisher distinct database roles or permission profiles within 'User' role? Update ADMIN_GUIDE to explicitly map personas to role/permission combinations.

inconsistencies.description: AI model references inconsistent. EXECUTION_MANIFEST references 'Claude Sonnet 4.5' while CONTENT_GENERATION references 'Claude claude-sonnet-4-5-20241022'. Model naming should be consistent.
inconsistencies.recommendation: Standardize on official Anthropic model ID: 'claude-sonnet-4-5-20241022' throughout all documentation.

inconsistencies.description: QA scoring thresholds differ. QA_MODULE defines: extraction 70%, content 85%, sheet 100%. PUBLISHER_GUIDE defines post-publication scoring: 90-100 PASS, 70-89 WARN, <70 FAIL. Different scales for different stages not clearly justified.
inconsistencies.recommendation: Consolidate scoring methodology. Either: (a) Use consistent thresholds across all stages, or (b) Document rationale for different thresholds at each stage.

inconsistencies.description: Publishing timeline inconsistent. EXECUTION_PROTOCOL references phase-based development milestones. PUBLISHER_GUIDE specifies 48-hour SLA from approval to publication. No connection between development phases and operational SLAs.
inconsistencies.recommendation: Clarify: 48-hour SLA is operational requirement post-launch. Add section specifying when SLAs become effective (post Phase X completion).

inconsistencies.description: PDF processing tool references inconsistent. MATERIAL_PREPARATION emphasizes pymupdf4llm for text extraction. CONTENT_GENERATION references 'PDF extraction pipeline' without specifying tool. Unclear if same or different processes.
inconsistencies.recommendation: Explicitly state in CONTENT_GENERATION.md: 'Text extraction uses pymupdf4llm as specified in MATERIAL_PREPARATION module.'

inconsistencies.description: Cost tracking scope differs. ADMIN_GUIDE tracks 'Anthropic and Google Gemini APIs'. DEVELOPER_GUIDE mentions only rate limiting without cost tracking. No mention of GCS storage costs which could be significant.
inconsistencies.recommendation: Expand cost tracking to include: Anthropic API, Gemini API, GCS storage, Sheets API (if applicable). Document in both guides.

ambiguities.text: Status workflow: draft -> processing -> pending_approval -> approved -> publishing -> published -> archived
ambiguities.question: Can projects move backwards in status (e.g., from 'approved' back to 'draft' for revisions)? What triggers 'archived' status - manual action or time-based?
ambiguities.recommendation: Document: Allowed status transitions (forward and backward), triggers for each transition, who can initiate each transition, archived criteria.

ambiguities.text: QA override functionality allows bypassing quality gates
ambiguities.question: Who can perform overrides? What level of override is allowed (single field vs. entire checkpoint)? Are there override limits?
ambiguities.recommendation: Specify: Override permission level (Admin only or Manager+), override scope options, maximum overrides per project, override review requirements.

ambiguities.question: What are 'appropriate permissions'? What is the minimum permission set required? Should service account have owner or editor access?
ambiguities.recommendation: List explicit IAM roles required: Storage Object Admin, Sheets Editor, Drive File Organizer. Specify principle of least privilege.

ambiguities.text: Review and approve content for publication
ambiguities.question: What constitutes approval criteria? Is there a checklist? Can approval be conditional or partial?
ambiguities.recommendation: Define: Approval checklist (brand compliance, accuracy, completeness), conditional approval workflow, rejection reasons (enumerated list).

ambiguities.text: Watermark detection using Google Gemini 1.5 Pro
ambiguities.question: What happens when watermark is detected? Auto-reject? Flag for review? Attempt removal? What constitutes a 'watermark' (logo, text, pattern)?
ambiguities.recommendation: Specify: Watermark types detected (text overlay, logo, pattern), detection confidence threshold, action on detection (flag vs. reject), manual review trigger.

ambiguities.text: Rate limits: Anonymous 5/hr, User 50/hr, Admin unlimited
ambiguities.question: How are rate limits enforced (sliding window, fixed window)? What response code on limit exceeded? Is there a burst allowance?
ambiguities.recommendation: Document: Rate limit algorithm (sliding window recommended), 429 response with Retry-After header, burst allowance (if any), rate limit headers in all responses.

ambiguities.question: What constitutes 'brand context'? Where is it stored? How is it updated? Is it template-specific or global?
ambiguities.recommendation: Define: Brand context components (tone, terminology, style rules), storage location, update procedure, template-specific overrides.

ambiguities.text: Template-specific checklists for Aggregators, OPR, MPP, ADOP, ADRE, Commercial
ambiguities.question: Are checklists enforced programmatically or manual verification only? What happens if checklist items are missed?
ambiguities.recommendation: Clarify: Checklist enforcement mechanism, blocking vs. warning for missed items, checklist completion tracking, post-publish verification.

ambiguities.question: What triggers a new version (any edit or significant changes only)? Who can create versions? Is there a review/approval process for prompt changes?
ambiguities.recommendation: Specify: Version trigger criteria, version naming convention, prompt change approval workflow, A/B testing capability.

ambiguities.question: What are the default thresholds? Who receives alerts? What actions are available (warning only vs. auto-pause)?
ambiguities.recommendation: Define: Default thresholds (70%, 90%, 100%), alert recipients (configurable), alert channels (email, in-app), auto-pause option at 100%.

ambiguities.question: How do agents coordinate on shared resources? What is the conflict resolution mechanism? How are dependencies between agents managed?
ambiguities.recommendation: Document: Agent coordination protocol, shared resource locking, dependency declaration format, conflict escalation path.

ambiguities.text: QA checkpoint thresholds: extraction 70%, content 85%, sheet 100%
ambiguities.question: Why different thresholds for different stages? What happens at exactly threshold value (pass or fail)? Are thresholds configurable?
ambiguities.recommendation: Clarify: Threshold rationale (extraction more tolerant, sheets exact match required), boundary behavior (>= threshold = pass), admin configurability.

critical_issues: GAP-001: No performance requirements - cannot validate system meets operational needs
GAP-002: Webhooks feature incomplete - external integration capability undefined
GAP-003: No disaster recovery specification - data loss risk unmitigated
INC-001: Role architecture confusion - may cause access control implementation errors
recommendations: IMMEDIATE: Resolve role architecture inconsistency (INC-001) before development - this affects core authorization logic
IMMEDIATE: Define performance requirements (GAP-001) - needed for infrastructure sizing and testing criteria
HIGH PRIORITY: Specify backup/DR procedures (GAP-003) - required for production readiness
HIGH PRIORITY: Clarify project status transitions (AMB-001) - affects workflow implementation
MEDIUM PRIORITY: Document all QA override rules (GAP-006, AMB-002) - needed for compliance
MEDIUM PRIORITY: Standardize AI model references (INC-002) - reduces confusion
BEFORE LAUNCH: Define API versioning strategy (GAP-011) - needed for long-term maintainability
BEFORE LAUNCH: Complete webhook specification (GAP-002) or remove from scope
blocking_items: GAP-001: Performance requirements must be defined to size infrastructure and write meaningful tests
INC-001: Role/permission architecture must be clarified to implement authorization correctly
GAP-003: DR requirements must be specified for Neon PostgreSQL configuration
development_can_proceed_if: Role architecture clarified in ADMIN_GUIDE.md with explicit persona-to-permission mapping
Basic performance targets documented (can be refined during development)
DR requirements specified (backup frequency, retention, RTO/RPO targets)
Webhook feature explicitly marked as Phase 2 / out-of-scope for initial release
